Bash(curl -s "http://localhost:8090/skill/script_create" -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"path\\":\\"Assets/Scripts/Editor/BallMeshReplacer.cs\\",\\"content\\":\\"using UnityEngine;\\\\nusing UnityEditor;\\\\n\\\\nnamespace SoccerBot\\\\n{\\\\n    public static class BallMeshReplacer\\\\n    {\\\\n        [MenuItem\(\\\\\\"SoccerBot/Replace Ball Mesh with Soccer Prefab\\\\\\"\)]\\\\n        public static void Replace\(\)\\\\n        {\\\\n            var ballGO = GameObject.Find\(\\\\\\"Ball\\\\\\"\);\\\\n            if \(ballGO == null\) { Debug.LogError\(\\\\\\"Ball GO not found\\\\\\"\); return; }\\\\n\\\\n            var soccerPrefab = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<GameObject>\(\\\\\\"Assets/Saritasa/Models/Sport_Balls/Soccer.prefab\\\\\\"\);\\\\n            if \(soccerPrefab == null\) { Debug.LogError\(\\\\\\"Soccer prefab not found\\\\\\"\); return; }\\\\n\\\\n            // Get mesh and material from prefab\\\\n            var srcFilter = soccerPrefab.GetComponentInChildren<MeshFilter>\(\);\\\\n            var srcRenderer = soccerPrefab.GetComponentInChildren<MeshRenderer>\(\);\\\\n            if \(srcFilter == null || srcRenderer == null\) { Debug.LogError\(\\\\\\"Soccer prefab missing MeshFilter or MeshRenderer\\\\\\"\); return; }\\\\n\\\\n            var dstFilter = ballGO.GetComponent<MeshFilter>\(\);\\\\n            var dstRenderer = ballGO.GetComponent<MeshRenderer>\(\);\\\\n            if \(dstFilter == null || dstRenderer == null\) { Debug.LogError\(\\\\\\"Ball GO missing MeshFilter or MeshRenderer\\\\\\"\); return; }\\\\n\\\\n            Undo.RecordObject\(dstFilter, \\\\\\"Replace Ball Mesh\\\\\\"\);\\\\n            Undo.RecordObject\(dstRenderer, \\\\\\"Replace Ball Material\\\\\\"\);\\\\n\\\\n            dstFilter.sharedMesh = srcFilter.sharedMesh;\\\\n            dstRenderer.sharedMaterials = srcRenderer.sharedMaterials;\\\\n\\\\n            // Scale to match original ball size \(soccer prefab may be different scale\)\\\\n            Undo.RecordObject\(ballGO.transform, \\\\\\"Scale Ball\\\\\\"\);\\\\n            ballGO.transform.localScale = Vector3.one * 0.22f;\\\\n\\\\n            EditorUtility.SetDirty\(ballGO\);\\\\n            Debug.Log\(\\\\\\"[BallMeshReplacer] Done — Ball mesh replaced with Soccer prefab mesh.\\\\\\"\);\\\\n        }\\\\n    }\\\\n}\\\\n\\"}")

Bash(curl -s "http://localhost:8090/skill/script_create" -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"path\\":\\"Assets/Scripts/Editor/GrassTextureUpgrader.cs\\",\\"content\\":\\"using UnityEngine;\\\\nusing UnityEditor;\\\\n\\\\nnamespace SoccerBot\\\\n{\\\\n    public static class GrassTextureUpgrader\\\\n    {\\\\n        [MenuItem\(\\\\\\"SoccerBot/Upgrade Grass Texture\\\\\\"\)]\\\\n        public static void Upgrade\(\)\\\\n        {\\\\n            var grassGO = GameObject.Find\(\\\\\\"Grass\\\\\\"\);\\\\n            if \(grassGO == null\) { Debug.LogError\(\\\\\\"Grass GO not found — run in Play Mode or after FieldBuilder runs\\\\\\"\); return; }\\\\n\\\\n            var renderer = grassGO.GetComponent<MeshRenderer>\(\);\\\\n            if \(renderer == null\) { Debug.LogError\(\\\\\\"Grass GO missing MeshRenderer\\\\\\"\); return; }\\\\n\\\\n            var albedo = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<Texture2D>\(\\\\\\"Assets/Game Buffs/Free Stylized Textures/Textures/Grass_37/Grass_37_Albedo.png\\\\\\"\);\\\\n            var normal = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<Texture2D>\(\\\\\\"Assets/Game Buffs/Free Stylized Textures/Textures/Grass_37/Grass_37_Normal.png\\\\\\"\);\\\\n            if \(albedo == null\) { Debug.LogError\(\\\\\\"Grass_37_Albedo not found\\\\\\"\); return; }\\\\n\\\\n            var mat = renderer.sharedMaterial;\\\\n            if \(mat == null\) { Debug.LogError\(\\\\\\"Grass has no material\\\\\\"\); return; }\\\\n\\\\n            Undo.RecordObject\(mat, \\\\\\"Upgrade Grass Texture\\\\\\"\);\\\\n            mat.SetTexture\(\\\\\\"_BaseMap\\\\\\", albedo\);\\\\n            if \(normal != null\) mat.SetTexture\(\\\\\\"_BumpMap\\\\\\", normal\);\\\\n            mat.SetTextureScale\(\\\\\\"_BaseMap\\\\\\", new Vector2\(4f, 4f\)\);\\\\n\\\\n            EditorUtility.SetDirty\(mat\);\\\\n            Debug.Log\(\\\\\\"[GrassTextureUpgrader] Done — Grass_37 albedo applied.\\\\\\"\);\\\\n        }\\\\n    }\\\\n}\\\\n\\"}")
